playbook.intent: One weekly source → fanout to X, IH, newsletter on a sustainable solo cadence.
playbook.scope: Run a sustainable single-source content cadence — one weekly action that fans out to X, IH, and the newsletter — without burning out on a nomad schedule. The cadence stays alive on low-energy weeks.

success-criteria.criterion: Variants fanned out to X and IH

stage.name: Source

tasks.task: Pick the format (essay, build-log, lesson recap)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after the format is locked for 4 weeks.

stage.name: Fanout
stage.intent: Variants land on X and IH within the same week.

tasks.task: Distil the artefact into a 1-tweet hook
Repackage into an IH post with a personal lens

stage.decision-gate: Done once both variants are live the week the source ships.

stage.name: Survive
stage.intent: Cadence has a documented low-energy escape hatch.

tasks.task: Pre-stage a backup post for travel weeks

stage.decision-gate: Maintain only if 4-week consecutive run holds.

extra.value: [Adding TikTok or YouTube — text-only fanout, Multiple weekly newsletter sends, Channel-specific content scratch — single source is canonical]
['Active accounts on X, IH, and newsletter', A clear positioning statement]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content build-in-public-weekly-cadence-single-source --format md, agent: faion get-content build-in-public-weekly-cadence-single-source --format context, json: faion get-content build-in-public-weekly-cadence-single-source --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
